def Notification():
  global data, room, pos1, mode, pos2, t_h_alert_count, now, temp_LCD, motion, motion_value, temp_threshold, start_t_total, temp_fan, temp_alert_count, humi_LCD, pos3, temp, humi, light_value, humi_fan, light_state, last_task_server, humi_threshold, start_h_total, humi_alert_count, device_state_changed, gio_bat_dau_t, last_motion_time, current_total, end_t_total, last_task_scheduler_mode, start_l_total, pos4, phut_bat_dau_t, end_h_total, last_task_automode, last_task_device_control_signal, gio_ket_thuc_t, end_l_total, pos5, curent_hour, phut_ket_thuc_t, current_minute, gio_bat_dau_h, phut_bat_dau_h, data0, gio_ket_thuc_h, phut_ket_thuc_h, gio_bat_dau_l, phut_bat_dau_l, gio_ket_thuc_l, phut_ket_thuc_l, aiot_lcd1602, aiot_dht20, tiny_rgb
  if temp > temp_threshold and humi > humi_threshold:
    t_h_alert_count = t_h_alert_count + 1
    if t_h_alert_count >= 30:
      mqtt.publish('notification', (str(room) + ':3'))
      t_h_alert_count = 0
  else:
    if temp > temp_threshold:
      temp_alert_count = temp_alert_count + 1
      if temp_alert_count >= 30:
        mqtt.publish('notification', (str(room) + ':1'))
        temp_alert_count = 0
    else:
      if temp < temp_threshold - 3:
        temp_alert_count = 0
    if humi > humi_threshold:
      humi_alert_count = humi_alert_count + 1
      if humi_alert_count >= 30:
        mqtt.publish('notification', (str(room) + ':2'))
        humi_alert_count = 0
    else:
      if humi < humi_threshold - 3:
        humi_alert_count = 0
    t_h_alert_count = 0
  if temp < temp_threshold - 3 and humi < humi_threshold - 3:
    mqtt.publish('notification', (str(room) + ':0'))
